episodes.title: God hates Australia - Westboro Baptist Church
episodes.description: God hates fags, now hates Australia. Fred Phelps hates Australia.

episodes.title: Exclusive Brethren
episodes.description: Exclusive Brethren might be in more trouble

episodes.title: Exclusive Brethren Cult
episodes.description: Exclusive Brethren do not vote but do have contact with government. They fund advertising campaigns in elections. No TV or radio. No university education. No computers, fax machines. Children not allowed to have lunch with other kids at school.

episodes.description: This method of teaching appears to involve non secular teaching.

episodes.title: Cult - Member Suicides After Leaving
episodes.description: Cult gets members to sign over their money, with dire consequences. They will meet angels. One member after leaving and not getting his savings back suicided.

episodes.description: Cult leader ruled like a god, brainwashed his followers.

episodes.title: God Hates Fags Westboro Baptist Church
episodes.description: Westboro Baptist Church. The church bases its work around the belief expressed by its best known slogan "God hates fags,"
